content_body: How delightful to be greeted by the family of deer on our arrival! This serene setting was great for pausing to unwind. Beautiful sunrises, magical stars at night, river soothing our hot feet, deer are a thrill to watch as well as the hummingbirds playing in the wildflowers. The fire pit, night sky, and moonrise was amazing!! Your spring fed pond with crystal clear water has some gorgeous fishy friends. We had a great grilled steak dinner with roasted potatos, pan-cooked asparagus glazed with butter and lemon and grilled broccolini! Lovely land! Thank you for sharing your place with us.
title: So Serene and Perfect for Unwinding
